review_notes: All six lean mappings and all three display records were checked against the measure dossiers. Bremerton's permanent rate and base increase plus added staffing and capital work support taxes 2 and spending 2. District 18's new excess levy and six-year capital bonds support taxes 2, while its defined replacement program supports spending 1. North Mason renews an existing restricted six-year EMS levy, supporting taxes 1 and spending 1. Rates, durations, modeled household costs, pro/con summaries, and disclosures that no opposition committee formed all match the dossiers. North Mason's recurring voter approval and restricted use do not place YES confidently on the rubric's local-versus-regional governance axis.
